images.prompt: Minimal flat illustration showing a globe, a passport, and simple comparison cards laid out side by side, representing plan comparison and international living. Clean modern design, white background, soft neutral colors, subtle blue accents, no people, no text, no medical imagery, no flags, professional utility style, simple shapes, lots of white space, calm and trustworthy.

Minimal flat illustration of stacked document cards with checkmarks, representing plan options and decision making. Clean modern icon-style design, white background, soft neutral colors, subtle blue accent, no text, no people, no medical symbols, simple geometry, consistent line weight, professional and neutral.

Minimal flat illustration of a map pin over a simplified abstract map shape, representing country-specific information. Clean modern design, white background, neutral color palette with light blue accent, no country flags, no landmarks, no text, no people, no medical imagery, simple and consistent icon style.

Minimal flat icon of two comparison cards side by side with a subtle checkmark, representing plan comparison. Simple line or flat style, white or transparent background, neutral gray with blue accent, no text, no gradients, clean and readable at small sizes.
